meta.title: Factories Are Families: How Does Security Join The Family?
meta.description: Kristin Demoranville and Stuart King tackle one of the softer, yet critical, security challenges ... getting accepted and working with the people responsible for production and safety. This a story filled session with many practical examples, with the message that security needs to have more empathy.
